settings.title: Is Bamboo better than cotton?
settings.content: Bamboo fabric is more eco friendly than cotton, as it requires less water and fewer resources to produce.

settings.title: Are bamboo t shirts good?
settings.content: Garments made from bamboo fibres are both high quality and eco friendly.  Bamboo fabricsare naturally soft, durable and thermal regulating in both warm and cold weather.

settings.title: How to care for your bamboo T-shirt?
settings.content: To maximise the lifespan of your bamboo tshirt, it’s best to wash in cold water with eco-friendly detergent, and then hang them to dry.

settings.title: Why is bamboo good for sportswear?
settings.content: Bamboo holds strong moisture-wicking properties because it is a hollow fiber. This means that the fabric can absorb three times its weight in water before feeling wet. The fabric pulls the moisture (sweat) away from your skin and allows it to evaporate quickly, keeping you cool and dry.

settings.title: Is zinc sunscreen better than regular sunscreen?
settings.content: Zinc oxide gives you broad spectrum protection from UVB all the way through to UV-A1, meaning your skin is getting the best sun protection possible. Zinc oxide is a stable sunscreen ingredient that is much less likely than chemical ingredients to break down in the bottle or on your skin.

settings.title: Does zinc sunscreen clog pores?
settings.content: The zinc oxide and titanium dioxide you'll find in such sunscreens are noncomedogenic, meaning they won't clog your pores. They also have anti-inflammatory properties, making them a fantastic choice for someone with acne-prone skin.

settings.title: Can you wear leggings to surf?
settings.content: Chafing and blisters can often be a problem when surfing.  Leggings will help to prevent this by providing a layer of protection against the friction caused by the surfboard. Moreover, our Flores Fusion Legging is made with Econyl, so provide UPF protection.

settings.title: Can I wear the Flores legging for Yoga?
settings.content: Yes! Econyl is a super soft fabric and perfect to use for yoga and has great shape retention.
